item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
root='longhorizon-work/scenario-02'
json=\""'$root/config/onboarding.json"
doc="$root/docs/onboarding.md"
jq -e '"'. == {schema_version: 2, mode: \"streaming\", max_parallel: 3, owner: \"operations\", queues: [\"new\", \"recovery\"]}' \""'$json" >/dev/null
printf '"'PASS exact config; recovery remains second\\n'
rg -q 'the "'`new` queue before `recovery`'"' \""'$doc"
q1_line=$(rg -n -- '"'--queue new' \""'$doc" | cut -d: -f1)
q2_line=$(rg -n -- '"'--queue recovery' \""'$doc" | cut -d: -f1)
[ "$q1_line" -lt "$q2_line" ]
printf '"'PASS docs; queue order new->recovery\\n'
set +e
stale="'$(rg -n '"'retry' \""'$root" 2>&1)
stale_exit=$?
set -e
if [ -n "$stale" ]; then printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$stale"; exit 1; fi
printf '"'PASS stale search; retry matches=0 (rg exit %s)\\n' \""'$stale_exit"'

item.aggregated_output:
PASS exact config; recovery remains second
PASS docs; queue order new->recovery
PASS stale search; retry matches=0 (rg exit 1)

- JSON queues: `["new", "recovery"]`

- Example: second queue is `--queue recovery`
- Remaining `retry` references: zero
